title: Nominal roll of consultant awards in England and Wales: 2025
body: "The nominal roll shows all holders of active national Clinical Excellence, Clinical Impact or Distinction Awards in England and Wales.  This list is published annually. It will not include changes to any awards after 1 April 2025. Changes after this date will be reflected in the next version of the nominal roll.  If you have a query about the award status of a particular consultant, contact the Advisory Committee on Clinical Impact Awards (ACCIA) secretariat:    England - accia@dhsc.gov.uk  Wales - accia@wales.nhs.uk   "
